summary: P0 BUGFIX VERIFIED - User Details > Login Activity panel now correctly shows login events. Root cause: auth-history endpoint was querying 'auth_events' collection but login events are stored in 'audit_logs' collection after refactor.

hotfix_validation.original_bug: Login Activity section showing 'No authentication events found' even though events exist in Audit Logs
hotfix_validation.root_cause: After refactor, login events stored in 'audit_logs' collection but get_user_auth_history() was still querying 'auth_events' collection
hotfix_validation.fix_applied: Updated /api/v1/admin/users/{user_id}/auth-history endpoint to query audit_logs collection with auth-related action filters (USER_LOGIN_SUCCESS, ADMIN_LOGIN_SUCCESS, USER_LOGOUT, LOGIN_FAILED, etc.)

key_validations: ✓ Auth history endpoint returns events (not empty)
✓ Events have correct fields (IP, timestamp, action, source, actor_email)
✓ Events are user-specific (only shows targeted user's events)
✓ No unrelated user events leak through
✓ Audit Logs page still works (no regression)
✓ Admin login events appear in audit logs

results: ✓ Login Activity card displays after clicking 'View Login Activity'
✓ NO 'No authentication events found' message displayed
✓ Login events visible in Audit Logs

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Auth action filters correctly defined (USER_LOGIN_SUCCESS, ADMIN_LOGIN_SUCCESS, USER_LOGOUT, etc.)
✓ Metadata fields (ip_address, user_agent, source) correctly mapped from audit_logs format
✓ Query correctly filters by performed_by, performed_by_email, or entity_id to ensure user-specific results
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user ashleyalt005@gmail.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 Login Activity bugfix VERIFIED. The fix correctly changed the auth-history endpoint to query audit_logs instead of auth_events collection. Events now display correctly with IP, timestamp, action type, and source. Test user ashleyalt005@gmail.com has many login events that can be used for validation.

rca_of_the_issue.issue: Login Activity panel showing 'No authentication events found'
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: After refactor, login events were stored in 'audit_logs' collection but the /auth-history endpoint was still querying the old 'auth_events' collection which was empty.
reproduction_steps: 5. BEFORE FIX: Panel shows 'No authentication events found'
6. AFTER FIX: Panel shows list of login/logout events with details
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Updated get_user_auth_history() in admin_users.py to query audit_logs collection instead of auth_events, with proper action filters (USER_LOGIN_SUCCESS, ADMIN_LOGIN_SUCCESS, USER_LOGOUT, LOGIN_FAILED, MFA_ENABLED, MFA_DISABLED, PASSWORD_CHANGED, PASSWORD_RESET) and correct metadata field mapping.
